items.title: Best Buy’s Back to School deal drops Lenovo’s 2026 Yoga 7a 2-in-1 touchscreen OLED Copilot+ PC to $750 ($450 off)
items.summary: As part of its now-live Back to School sale, Best Buy is offering Lenovo’s latest Yoga 7a 2-in-1 touchscreen Copilot+ PC for $749.99 shipped. This is one of the brand’s newest Windows laptops, having launched earlier this year with a Ryzen AI 5 430 quad-core processor and a $1,200 price tag. It saw its first deal just last month when it dropped to $800 ahead of the Prime Day sale, and today’s offer takes an additional $50 off to mark a new best price to beat. It’s a great option to consider if you don’t want to splurge upwards of $1,000 on a new laptop, and you can learn more about it in detail below.

items.title: Originally $800 TP-Link Deco BE63 Pro premium Wi-Fi 7 3-pack mesh system is down to $322
items.summary: We are now tracking a deal at Amazon, which drops the TP-Link Deco BE63 Pro Wi-Fi 7 3-node mesh system for $322.19 shipped. Originally priced at $800, this three-pack has typically been fetching between $470 and $500 at Amazon this year, so today’s deal saves you around $150 from its recent going rate. It briefly dropped to $230 as part of a short-lived offer on TP-Link routers last October, but this is the best price we have tracked for this 3-pack outside of that offer. This is also a limited offer with a countdown that expires later today, so you might want to jump in and snag it now after getting more details below.

items.title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
items.summary: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.

items.title: Elon Musk praises Mythos/Fable, promises not to ‘cut off’ Anthropic
items.summary: Should Anthropic trust Elon Musk to host its models? With about $40 billion in revenue at stake, Musk insists that the company can.

items.title: Get ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and more for life at $60 ($540 value)

items.title: Pack the BougeRV 2026 telescopic camping light for your outdoor adventures while down at $81 right now
items.summary:
BougeRV 2026 Telescopic Camping Light

Buy for $81 (Reg. $100)

What we love

Got plenty of outdoor adventures planned for the rest of summer? Well, this handy BougeRV camping light is a versatile device that you should definitely consider adding to your kit, as its 15,600mAh battery allows for up to 102 hours of lighting on each full charge. Not only that, but it goes from a 2.4-pound compact and portable size and extends up to 5.5 feet tall, complete with adjustable lights and three modes (daylight, amber, red).

items.title: Patch for Windows Defender 0-day could allow attackers to fill hard disk
items.summary: The feud between NightmareEclipse and Microsoft shows no signs of resolving soon.

items.title: Score Whisker’s Litter-Robot 3 Connect with a loaded up core bundle at its $599 2026 low, more
items.summary: By way of its official Amazon storefront, Whisker is offering the Litter-Robot 3 Connect Core Bundle down at $599 shipped, which you can’t find directly from the brand’s website anymore. Normally $699 at full price, we’ve only seen three previous discounts to $649 and $599 in 2026, with it back again for you today. While the deal lasts, you’re getting a $100 markdown to the lowest price we have tracked this year. The bundle contains the Litter-Robot, a LitterTrap mat, a fence, a ramp, 25 waste bin liners, three carbon filters, and a 1-year warranty. You can also find the Litter-Robot 3 Connect for $499 shipped (with a hands-on review available to get in-depth info), or you can find the brand’s newer model deals on the direct website here.

The update, announced on Thursday, adds a "created or edited with AI" label under the "how this ad was made" tab. Users can […]

items.title: Amazon just dropped the EGO Power+ 3,200 PSI electric pressure washer with 2x batteries to a new $679 low ($200 off), more
items.summary: Amazon is giving EGO Power+ fans a new all-time low price on the popular 3,200 PSI Electric Pressure Washer with 2x 6.0Ah batteries for $679 shipped. It dropped down from its $879 full price to $779 in mid-May and held there for most of the time since, with a short-lived drop to the former $699 low at the top of June. Now though, you can get it with a larger-than-ever $200 markdown off the tag, landing things at a new all-time low price. There’s also the more compact 2,100 PSI model with or without batteries starting from $299 shipped, as well as some additional deals to browse in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Meta enters the crowded AI coding battle with Muse Spark 1.1
items.summary: Meta's pitch to users is Spark's ability to handle large agentic workloads, fix bugs, and help with large code migrations — the kind of automation that enterprises are increasingly turning to AI companies to provide.
